morning.notes: Basho found the same thing in the bushes again. Still a rabbit. Still five minutes.

camera.notes: Saturday morning. The coffee shop. The same table. I sat across the room and took 34 photos over two hours. The light through the east window at 8:40am is something. Two of the photos are good. I know which two.
camera.showed_to: no one yet — that's the next step

work.notes: Told my manager I needed two more weeks on the Senior AE question. She said okay. I have two weeks.
work.honest_note: I am writing out what I actually want from work, which I have not done since the business. The question is harder than I expected because the last time I answered it, the answer was entangled with Elena and the answer dissolved when she left. I need an answer that's just mine.

debt.notes: Budget review Sunday. Steady. The June commission should be strong — the deal that pushed looks like it will close.

portland.notes: Flight is booked. Hotel booked. Marcus texted 'I'll believe it when I see you.' Fair.

reading.notes: Finished the boat book. The man finishes the boat and sails it one mile and then sails back. That's the whole ending. I sat with this for a while. I think I understand it.

wins: First camera session done — two good photos
at_risk: Senior AE decision — two weeks; need to actually think about it this week, not just defer
note: Two good photos out of 34 tries is not a bad ratio for a first session. I'm going back Saturday.
